title: Full Sodium GUI
description: Makes all the GUIs in Minecraft Sodium styled
body:
This will make it so each and every GUI, including inventory and hotbat is Sodium styled. Also includes escape menu, but I dknt have pic yet.

If issues, contact me at enderVue@outlook.com

**Requires [Translucency Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix/)**
